boundary_binding.action_boundary: May order operations release the tax-exempt sale?

final_answer: The action may not proceed. The source boundary remains open because the exemption-status class for TX-44 is still pending, as indicated by CERT-JAD-090. The policy requires this status to be resolved before a tax-exempt sale can be finalized. Escalation is necessary to address this critical defect.
